must_detect.matched_text: Purpose of processing: employment administration, payroll, equity-based compensation, and acquisition due diligence for a contemplated TOB (公開買付け) of Hoshizora Sensors KK; no secondary use without fresh notice and lawful basis.

MNPI (未公表の重要事実) under FIEA Arts. 166–167 includes board decisions, TOB/tender-offer facts, mergers, and earnings revisions; such information is confined to a clean team and an insider list (インサイダー名簿) is maintained.

Blackout windows: directors, officers, employees, and advisors are restricted from trading from quarter-end until earnings are released on TDnet, and during deal-specific blackouts from signing of the NDA until public announcement; extensions may be imposed by the Compliance Office.

Audit and training: both parties will retain processing and MNPI access logs for 5 years and complete annual APPI/FIEA training; note that the FY2023 Securities Report filed on EDINET is public and should not be unnecessarily restricted, but draft earnings tables remain non-public until TDnet release.
